narrative:
Columbiana County has 63,712 registered voters, with 58.0% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 27.1% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 14.8%, a pronounced Republican lean of 12.3 percentage points. Baby Boomers are the largest generational cohort at 31.9% of registrants.
